pi_items.source: task.json metadata field; reasonable output filename for FreeCAD exploded assembly file
task.json metadata field; reasonable group/container name in FreeCAD document structure
task.json metadata field; cross-referenced with input data showing TopBox initial Pz=-247.0mm, which when displaced +50mm becomes -197.0mm
task.json metadata field; reasonable tolerance for verifying Z displacement accuracy in millimeters
task.json metadata field; RGB value represents pure red color (R=255, G=0, B=0), appropriate for TopBox visual styling
task.json metadata field; RGB value represents pure blue color (R=0, G=0, B=255), appropriate for BottomBox visual styling
task.json metadata field; specifies 50% transparency for TopBox to create visual exploded effect

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real FreeCAD test suite data from the FEM module's constraint_contact_solid_solid example. The input file (contact_blocks.FCStd) contains two Part::Box objects named TopBox (initial Z position: -247.0 mm) and BottomBox (initial Z position: -52.0 mm). The task requires creating an 'Assembly' group, displacing TopBox 50mm in positive Z direction to -197.0mm, applying red color to TopBox with 50% transparency, and blue color to BottomBox, then saving as exploded_assembly.FCStd. All metadata values are consistent with the actual data structure and task requirements.
